name: error record
description: Represents a single error or exception thrown during program runtime

properties.name: exception type
properties.description: The name of this exception type. Typically the exception class name.

properties.name: stack trace id
properties.description: Id of the topmost stack trace element that corresponds to this error record

properties.name: cause id
properties.description: Id of the underlying error that caused this error/failure. None if this error represents the root problem.

name: issue
description: Represents a type of problem or an issue that may occur during a program's run

properties.name: context
properties.description: Program context where this issue occurred or was logged. Should be unique.

properties.name: severity
properties.description: The estimated severity of this issue

properties.name: created
properties.description: Time when this issue first occurred or was first recorded

name: issue occurrence
description: Represents one or more specific occurrences of a recorded issue

properties.name: case id
properties.description: Id of the issue variant that occurred

properties.name: error messages
properties.description:
Error messages listed in the stack trace. 
If multiple occurrences are represented, contains data from the latest occurrence.

properties.name: details
properties.description:
Additional details concerning these issue occurrences.
In case of multiple occurrences, contains only the latest entry for each detail.

properties.name: count
properties.description: Number of issue occurrences represented by this entry

properties.name: occurrence period
properties.description: The first and last time this set of issues occurred

name: issue variant
description: Represents a specific setting where a problem or an issue occurred

properties.name: issue id
properties.description: Id of the issue that occurred

properties.name: version
properties.description: The program version in which this issue (variant) occurred

properties.name: error id
properties.description: Id of the error / exception that is associated with this issue (variant). None if not applicable.

properties.name: details
properties.description: Details about this case and/or setting.

properties.name: created
properties.description: Time when this case or variant was first encountered

name: stack trace element record
description:
Represents a single error stack trace line.
A stack trace indicates how an error propagated through the program flow before it was recorded.

properties.name: file name
properties.description: Name of the file in which this event was recorded

properties.name: class name
properties.description:
Name of the class in which this event was recorded. 
Empty if the class name is identical with the file name.

properties.name: method name
properties.description: Name of the method where this event was recorded. Empty if unknown.

properties.name: line number
properties.description: The code line number where this event was recorded. None if not available.

properties.name: cause id
properties.description:
Id of the stack trace element that originated this element. I.e. the element directly before this element. 
None if this is the root element.

properties.name: issue id
properties.description: ID of the commented issue

properties.name: text
properties.description: The text contents of this comment

properties.name: created
properties.description: Time when this comment was recorded

name: issue alias
description: Assigns a more human-readable name to an issue. May also be used to adjust issue severity.

properties.name: issue id
properties.description: ID of the described issue

properties.name: alias
properties.description: Alias given to the issue. Empty if no alias is given.

properties.name: new severity
properties.description: New severity level assigned for the issue. None if severity is not modified.

properties.name: created
properties.description: Time when this alias was given

name: issue notification
description: Represents a notification generated based on a reappeared issue

properties.name: resolution id
properties.description: ID of the resolution on which this notification is based

properties.name: created
properties.description: Time when this issue notification was added to the database

properties.name: closed
properties.description: Time when this notification was closed / marked as read

name: resolution
description: Marks an issue as resolved (or to be ignored) in some way

properties.name: resolved issue id
properties.description: ID of the resolved issue

properties.name: comment id
properties.description: ID of the comment added to this resolution, if applicable

properties.name: version threshold
properties.description:
The last version number (inclusive), to which silencing may apply, and for which notifications are NOT generated. 
None if not restricted by version.

properties.name: created
properties.description: Time when this resolution was registered

properties.name: deprecates
properties.description: Time when this resolution expires, was removed or was broken. May be in the future.

properties.name: silences
properties.description: Whether the issue should not be reported while this resolution is active.

properties.name: notifies
properties.description:
Whether a notification should be generated if this resolution is broken. 
Note: Only one notification may be generated in total.
